channel.title: FPGA Design Tips on EasyFPGA
channel.description: Recent content in FPGA Design Tips on EasyFPGA

item.title: Refactor, Refine, Fix, and Optimize: Precise Terminology for RTL Development
item.description: Using the right word when reviewing or requesting RTL changes makes communication faster and less ambiguous. Here is what each term means in an FPGA context.

item.title: Board-Level Understanding and Debugging for FPGA Engineers
item.description: FPGA design is not just RTL — you need to understand power integrity, signal integrity, and hardware debugging techniques to ship working boards.

item.title: FPGA Price Surge: Design Challenges and Alternative Strategies
item.description: How post-pandemic chipflation hit FPGA pricing, what it means for product design, and what strategies engineers are using to cope.
